page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: AASP400 or AAAS400.

Formerly: AASP400.

AAAS402 Classic Readings in African American and Africana Studies (3 Credits)

Classic readings of the social, economic and political status of Blacks and other minorities in the United States and the Americas. Prerequisite: AAAS202 or AAAS100.
